steps.name: product-spec-and-phase-scaffolding
steps.summary: Created product PRD, architecture, ADR 0001, and durable plan for the UI Vocabulary Encyclopedia. MVP is a static Vite React TypeScript site with Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, YAML source data, generated site data, mini UI visual components beside terms, and poster view deferred until after card rendering works.

steps.name: vocabulary-dataset-foundation
steps.summary: Added docs/ui-vocabulary/terms.yml with 60 starter terms across input, selection, action, structure, feedback, and data-display categories. Validation passed with required schema fields, unique ids, Korean and English names, prompt phrases, visual anatomy, assets, sources, and confidence values.

steps.name: react-shadcn-site-scaffold
steps.summary: Created examples/ui-vocabulary-site with Vite React TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, shadcn/ui components, lucide icons, root-to-site data generation via scripts/build-ui-vocabulary-data.mjs, and a minimal first screen rendering 12 vocabulary cards with mini visual placeholders from generated 60-term data. npm run build passed.

steps.name: glossary-browsing-experience
steps.summary: Implemented client-side search, Korean category filters, clickable term cards, a detail Sheet, and reusable term visual renderer for all 60 seed terms. Build passed; browser smoke confirmed desktop/mobile render and search logic for 토글/모달/dropdown.

steps.name: poster-style-summary-view
steps.summary: Replaced the separate poster-view milestone with a lighter browser print workflow: added a top-right PDF save action that opens window.print() and print CSS that hides controls while formatting the term grid for A4 output.

steps.name: vocabulary-expansion-batch-1
steps.summary: Expanded the editable YAML dataset from 60 to 106 terms, adding foundational visual atoms, input details, navigation patterns, action buttons, dashboard controls, and feedback states. Added matching TermVisual variants so new terms render as recognizable mini UI assets instead of falling back to generic placeholders.

steps.name: remaining-planned-candidates
steps.summary: Added 31 remaining planned candidates from component-expansion-plan.md, growing the dataset from 126 to 157 terms. Implemented interactive visual variants for search view, tree navigation, side sheet, breadcrumbs menu, icon toggle button, resizable panel, master-detail, sticky bars, sidebar sections, inline/error/confirmation/rate-limit states, data table controls, advanced filters, stats/activity/map, scrubber/range/multi-select/transfer/virtualized/infinite/pull/swipe/wizard/toast-stack/skeleton-table. npm run build and npm run lint passed; render smoke confirmed 157 / 157 terms.

steps.name: batch-1-practical-forms-filters-details
steps.summary: Added 20 practical data, filter, list, row detail, audit, and account/workspace switching terms, growing the dataset from 157 to 177 terms. Implemented matching mini visual variants and fixed nested interactive button markup for switcher visuals. npm run build and npm run lint passed; render smoke confirmed 177 / 177 terms.
